name: dbhub
description: Token-efficient database MCP server for PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, and SQLite, with skills for connection setup and schema exploration

dsn.title: Database connection string (DSN)
dsn.description: Examples: postgres://user:password@localhost:5432/dbname | mysql://user:password@localhost:3306/dbname | mariadb://user:password@localhost:3306/dbname | sqlserver://user:password@localhost:1433/dbname | sqlite:///path/to/database.db. Append ?sslmode=require for SSL. Use a least-privilege, read-only database account.
